title: The Territorial Waters, Continental Shelf, Exclusive Economic Zone and Other Maritime Zones Act, 1976
full_text: The Territorial Waters, Continental Shelf, Exclusive Economic Zone and Other Maritime Zones Act, 1976 राज्यक्षेत्रीय सागर-खण्ड, महाद्वीपीय मग्नतटभूमि, अनन्य आर्थिक क्षेत्र और अन्य सामुद्रिक क्षेत्रअधिनियम, 1976 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1976-80 Act Number: 80 Enactment Date: 1976-08-25 Act Year: 1976 Short Title: The Territorial Waters, Continental Shelf, Exclusive Economic Zone and Other Maritime Zones Act, 1976 Hindi Title: राज्यक्षेत्रीय सागर-खण्ड, महाद्वीपीय मग्नतटभूमि, अनन्य आर्थिक क्षेत्र और अन्य सामुद्रिक क्षेत्रअधिनियम, 1976 Long Title: An Act to provide for certain matters relating to the territorial waters continental shelf, exclusive economic zone and other maritime zones of India. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-01-1977 Notification: 15th January, 1977, vide notification No. G.S.R. 16(E), dated 15th January, 1977, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Maritime boundaries between India and States having coasts opposite or adjacent to those of India. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Publication of charts. Previous sanction of the Central Government for prosecution. Section 15. Power to make rules. Section 16. Removal of difficulties.
